name: LIWANLI Innovation Co., Ltd.
summary: LIWANLI Innovation Co., Ltd. operates in the biomedical science industry. The company provides products in the areas of nutrition and healthcare. It offers Vigoway and powder collection products for male, female, elderly, and children audience. The company was formerly known as Carry Technology International Co., Ltd. and changed its name to LIWANLI Innovation Co., Ltd. in 2015. LIWANLI Innovation Co., Ltd. was founded in 1991 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
